data.title: Implement ticket_transition (thin-wrapper) in library and wire dispatcher
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What to Implement
Add ticket_transition to plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh and wire dispatcher transition case.

## Scope (thin-wrapper — ticket-transition.sh is 456 lines; most complex thin-wrapper)
ticket_transition <ticket_id> [current_status] <target_status> [--reason=<reason>]:
- Parse args; validate status transitions (open→in_progress, in_progress→open, in_progress→closed, etc.)
- If DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1: exec bash $SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-transition.sh "$@"; return $?
- Thin wrapper: call python3 reducer (one call) to read current state for optimistic concurrency; then write TRANSITION event via bash-native write_commit_event
- Preserve optimistic concurrency guard: current_status must match actual state; exit 2 if mismatch
- Preserve --reason flag for bug close requirement
- Use return (not exit) for all error paths
- Target: <0.15s (one python3 call for current-state read)

Dispatcher change: replace exec bash .../ticket-transition.sh with _ticketlib_dispatch ticket_transition "$@"

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ticket_transition defined in ticket-lib-api.sh
  Verify: grep -q "^ticket_transition" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh
- [ ] Optimistic concurrency: mismatched current_status returns exit 2
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "PASS.*transition"
- [ ] DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 routes to ticket-transition.sh
  Verify: grep -A5 "ticket_transition" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh | grep -q "DSO_TICKET_LEGACY"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
